mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1 AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND t2.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND t1.EMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{emerName} || '%'
ORDER BY t1.EMERGENCY_NO DESC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.EMERGENCY_NO = #{emergencyNo} AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS ( EMERGENCY_NO, PERSON_ID, EMER_NAME, EMER_PHONE, EMER_PHONE_SECOND, EMER_EMAIL, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, EMER_ADDRESS, EMER_TYPE_CODE, ACTIVITY, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, NATIONALITY, EMER_CELLPHONE, EMER_WORK_PHONE, MAIN_CONTACT_ADDRESS, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{emerName}, #{emerPhone}, #{emerPhoneSecond}, #{emerEmail}, #{mainLiaisonOffice}, #{emerAddress}, #{emerTypeCode}, 1, #{isEmergencyAddress}, #{nationality}, #{emerCellphone}, #{emerWorkPhone}, #{mainContactAddress}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, EMER_NAME = #{emerName}, EMER_PHONE = #{emerPhone}, EMER_PHONE_SECOND = #{emerPhoneSecond}, EMER_EMAIL = #{emerEmail}, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE = #{mainLiaisonOffice}, EMER_ADDRESS = #{emerAddress}, EMER_TYPE_CODE = #{emerTypeCode}, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS = #{isEmergencyAddress}, NATIONALITY = #{nationality}, EMER_CELLPHONE = #{emerCellphone}, EMER_WORK_PHONE = #{emerWorkPhone}, MAIN_CONTACT_ADDRESS = #{mainContactAddress}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE EMERGENCY_NO = #{emergencyNo}
